articles.title: A Fragment
articles.author: Sarah E. Hawley Pearson
articles.notes: This is a complete poem by Sarah E. Hawley Pearson that appears in the contents listing and is substantial enough to be a standalone piece. It's clearly literary content, not miscellaneous material.

misc_summary: The remaining content consists of legitimate miscellaneous material: magazine cover/masthead information, table of contents, advertisers' directory with business listings, General Board member listings, and various advertisements for local Salt Lake City businesses including hotels, clothing stores, drug stores, theaters, and funeral services.
